title: Orbital strike cannon
description:
This plugins is simple and adds 2 commands
/strike /orbital to summon orbital cannon strikes or nukes
/orbital still in beta!
body:
This adds 2 commands
/strike (X,Z)
at those co ords a strike of tnt from worldheight to y:0 will spawn and blow a straight line OBLITERATING a hole

/oribal (X,Z)
summons rings of tnt at those co ords
